metadata.name: Provide Event Schedule for a Festival

description: A visitor at a music festival wants to know the performance schedule for the main stage today.

nodes.task_description: Identify the event (music festival) and the specific request (main stage schedule for today).
Retrieve the event schedule from the information system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the list of bands and their set times for the main stage.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the schedule to the visitor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly lists the bands and their performance times.
